pre_downsample.comment: Pre-downsampling: auto-trigger above threshold and randomly reduce to threshold point count.

outlier_removal.comment: Outlier removal: only remove obvious floating points (max 1% reduction), conservative R-OR and SOR.

z_up_alignment.comment: Z-up alignment: detect multiple planes and select the best floor candidate.

scale_adjustment.comment: Scale adjustment: map to the ScanNet scale distribution (probabilistic sampling).

spacing_normalization.comment: Spacing normalization: r^3 rule + perfect spacing sampling + iterative refinement.

density_adjustment.comment: Density adjustment: only correct extreme outliers within +/-30%.

normal_estimation.comment: Normal estimation: KNN normals with chunk processing above one million points.
